description: T THE GREAT FREE LABOR INTEREST OF THE NORTHWEST At a convention of not less than 400 free people of the NorthWest held at Unionviile Ashtabula Co Ohio on the 5th of July a committee was appointed to iee lo gelling up a NorthWestern grain growers and wheatinterest Convention to he held at Cleveland in September The committee consists of Thomas Rich mond Edward Wade and J A Foote Esqrs Cleveland James II Payne Eq Faincsvillc Dr O Iv Hawley Austins burgh Leicester King Warren and B Owen Esq Conneaut That looks like doing business Long enough have llie free graingrowers of the NorthWest waited in humble patience for successive pro slavery administrations just to remember that there was such an inter est as theirs but waited in vain Next winter perhaps we shall hear something about it in Congress Possibly even Mr Webster being a Northern man may find occasion lo write as good a letter about Northern Wheal as he has already written about Southern Tobacco and Rice In the mean time we ask our readers to advert to another sign of the times in the pub lication of the following article as a load ing editorial in
